headline: Marriott (MAR) Signs China And Saudi Hotel Expansion Deals
summary: Marriott International (NasdaqGS:MAR) has agreed with CG Hospitality Global to develop about 100 Series by Marriott hotels in Greater China. The company has also signed an agreement with Blacksand to develop ten new hotels in Saudi Arabia. Both deals expand Marriott's footprint in two large travel markets that are priorities for its global growth plans. Marriott International operates a broad portfolio of hotel brands across price points and regions, and these new agreements extend that...
